{{CargoClone
|name=Master Mohist
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=194
|gene1={race} ATK +50
|gene2={race} TECH +50
|gene3=Per 10% HP lost, {race} ATK +60
|gene4=Per 60 Mutant Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +6
|gene5=Resolver: Mutagen Serum +1.5%
|gene6=Per 60 Mutant Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +10
|gene7=Resolver: Mutagen Serum +2.5%
|}}
